ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the observer (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "assigned_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the station to which the observer is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather station
Date when the station was installed
Current operational status of the station (active, inactive, maintenance)
Contact information for the station (e.g., email, phone)
Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time of the last login
Name of the role (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator)
JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role
Date when the sensor was installed
Current operational status of the sensor (active, inactive, maintenance)
Contact information for the observer (e.g., email, phone)
ID of the station to which the observer is assigned
